title: Social Post V0.2.0
lead: Headline: Stop building boring API clients. Start generating Artifacts. 🌌
content_markdown:
# Social Media Announcements for v0.2.0

## LinkedIn: The "Developer Experience" Focus

**Headline: Stop building boring API clients. Start generating Artifacts. 🌌**

Let’s be honest: most CLI tools feel like they were built in 1998. We decided to change that.

Introducing **GIDEVO v0.2.0**—the API tool that treats Developer Experience (DX) as a first-class citizen.

We didn't just add features; we overhauled the entire engine:
✨ **The "Avant-Garde" UI**: A stunning new interface that makes code generation feel like piloting a spaceship.
🔐 **Fort Knox Security**: Your API tokens are now guarded by a hybrid System Keychain + AES-256 vault.
🐍 **Python Superpowers**: We now generate full **Pydantic** models. Type hints, runtime validation, and zero boilerplate.

It’s type-safe. It’s secure. And frankly, it looks incredible in your terminal.

Stop writing boilerplate. Start synthesizing.

**Check the repo:** 👇
[https://github.com/LehroSolutions/gidevo-api-tool](https://github.com/LehroSolutions/gidevo-api-tool)

#DevTools #DX #TypeScript #Python #OpenSource #Engineering

---

## X (Twitter): The "Hype" Focus

**GIDEVO v0.2.0 dropped. 🌌**

We built the CLI you actually *want* to use.

✨ Avant-Garde UI (it's beautiful)
🔐 AES-256 Token Vault
🐍 Full Pydantic Support

Your terminal deserves this upgrade.

👇
